Hubbell is increasingly evaluating, developing, or utilizing artificial intelligence (AI), including machine learning, automation, and data driven analytics technologies, whether internally, embedded in third party software products, or integrated into customer facing solutions.
Advancements in, and increased adoption of, artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, automation, and other advanced technologies may result in a long-term competitive disadvantage.

The use of AI technologies introduces additional risks related to system reliability, data integrity, transparency, governance, and security. AI enabled systems may also increase the Company's exposure to cybersecurity, data privacy, and intellectual property risks.

We are subject to risks surrounding our information technology systems and industrial controls systems failures, and the use of emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence, as well as, network disruptions, breaches in data security and compliance with data privacy laws or regulations.
